'''Ut''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Ut system/Legends|Ut system]] of the [[Hapes Cluster/Legends|Hapes Cluster]]. It provided a song to [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] when the [[Hapes Consortium/Legends|Hapes Consortium]] sent a diplomatic envoy to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] in [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]].{{Planet-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[The Courtship of Princess Leia]]'' {{Ab|The Courtship of Princess Leia (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1stm|in book}}
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse]]'' {{Mo}}
